task_description: Fix recruit buttons layout overflow (CSS), fix region-forces icon wrapping to 3rd row prematurely (CSS), and translate all remaining English log messages to Spanish in gameLogic.ts and gameStore.ts

verification.summary: npx vite build passes successfully. CSS fixes confirmed: flex-wrap:wrap in .recruit-buttons; max-width:calc(5*21px+4*3px) in .region-forces. All English log messages translated to Spanish with proper diacritics (ñ, ó, é, í, ú). Card effects in types/game.ts intentionally NOT translated per project requirements.
